steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery

steps.expression: (() => { const close = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Close')); if (close) { close.click(); } return true; })()

steps.text: Comparison Table added to the report document.

steps.expression: (() => { const dialog = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[role="dialog"]')).find((node) => ((node.innerText || node.textContent || '').includes('Edit Table Block'))); if (!dialog) { throw new Error('Edit Table Block dialog not found.'); } const button = Array.from(dialog.querySelectorAll('button')).find((node) => ((node.innerText || node.textContent || '').includes('Household Uniques'))); if (!button) { throw new Error('Household Uniques column toggle not found.'); } button.click(); })()

(() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Save artifact')); return !!button && !button.disabled && button.getAttribute('aria-disabled') !== 'true'; })()

steps.text: Saved exploration artifact: Report Builder Demo
Saved report payload: Report Builder Demo
Get ReportDocument response: Report Builder Demo

steps.expression: (() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Reopen in builder')); if (!button) { throw new Error('Reopen in builder button not found.'); } button.click(); })()

steps.text: Reopened ReportDocument Report Builder Demo for editing.

steps.expression: (() => { const panels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-runtime-table-panel')); return panels.some((panel) => { const text = panel.innerText || panel.textContent || ''; return text.includes('Comparison Table') && text.includes('Delivery Date') && text.includes('Available Impressions') && !text.includes('Household Uniques'); }); })()
